description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent hip roof covered in textured shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light, smooth material, likely stucco or painted concrete, and the building is surrounded by a low, modern perimeter wall. A covered carport or veranda extends from one side, supported by sturdy columns, and a gated section provides access to the driveway. The windows are rectangular and arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to a contemporary look. The property includes a paved area and landscaped elements visible near the entrance, enhancing its urban curb appeal.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a hip roof, light exterior walls, a covered carport, and asymmetrical window placement, surrounded by a low perimeter wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport/veranda, and a gated driveway with landscaping elements.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the carport/veranda and the hip roof's overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, additional windows, and the continuation of the perimeter wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a solid wall with minimal windows and the rear section of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
